notes: sign-identification equivalence encodes C3 iff condition.
BY increment should be positive for q,m,H_m > 0.
sign_identification_equivalence_cnf: ((Abs(Delta) > Gamma*Abs(gamma)) | (Delta + Gamma*Abs(gamma) >= 0)) & ((Abs(Delta) > Gamma*Abs(gamma)) | (Delta - Gamma*Abs(gamma) <= 0)) & ((Abs(Delta) <= Gamma*Abs(gamma)) | (Delta + Gamma*Abs(gamma) < 0) | (Delta - Gamma*Abs(gamma) > 0))
